title: Document

child_sections.title: INDEPENDENT AUDiTOR’S REPORT
child_sections.summary: The Independent Auditor's Report covers the financial statements of **Development Bank of Ethiopia** as of **June 30, 2023**. The report signifies an external review of the bank’s financial position and performance for that period. It serves as assurance to stakeholders regarding the reliability of these financial records, though the specific opinion/findings aren't detailed in this excerpt.
